scene.message: Oishi: What an awful dream.{nl} Oh, my head is pounding...{waitkey}{ret}
Oishi: Education isn't only{nl} about handing out punishment.{waitkey}{ret}
Kiichi: Pipe down, will ya!{nl} I'm kinda busy here!{waitkey}Dog. {wait_fr:30}Dog. {wait_fr:30}Dog. {wait_fr:30}Mutt. {wait_fr:30}Dog{wait_fr:30}......{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: That Kiichi kid's{nl} still copying kanji?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Nothing will come of{nl} staying here.{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Let's hurry up and{nl} go somewhere else.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Where could the Snow{nl} Queen have gone?{waitkey}{ret}
